monitoredModules.name: Microsoft.Graph.Authentication
monitoredModules.purpose: Graph authentication stack and Azure.Core compatibility source.

monitoredModules.name: ExchangeOnlineManagement
monitoredModules.purpose: Exchange identity, broker, and OData compatibility source.

monitoredModules.name: Az.Storage
monitoredModules.purpose: Az Storage OData compatibility source for Exchange coexistence.

exactPins.reason: Windows PowerShell 5.1 requires Azure.Core to match the upstream Graph/Teams assembly identity that triggers issue #156-style type identity failures.

blockedPreloadAssemblies.reason: Issue #174 showed that default OData preloading can break Az.Storage when ExchangeOnlineManagement and Az.Storage require incompatible OData identities.
Keep the OData family out of the default preload set unless a future isolation strategy is implemented.
Keep the OData family out of the default preload set unless a future isolation strategy is implemented.
